  0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x02, 0x00, 0x00, 0x0C, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,

  0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x04, 0x00, 0x00, 0x1F, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
  0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x04, 0x00, 0x00, 0x10, 0x70, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
  0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x04, 0x01, 0xF8, 0x10, 0x40, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
  0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x0C, 0x7F, 0xFC, 0x38, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,

};
显示代码：
OLED_Clear(&oled);
OLED_SetCursor(&oled, 0, 0);
OLED_DrawBitmap(&oled, 128, 64, bitmap_1);
OLED_SendBuffer(&oled);
Delay(25);

OLED_Clear(&oled);
OLED_SetCursor(&oled, 0, 0);
OLED_DrawBitmap(&oled, 128, 64, bitmap_2);
OLED_SendBuffer(&oled);
Delay(25);

OLED_Clear(&oled);
OLED_SetCursor(&oled, 0, 0);
OLED_DrawBitmap(&oled, 128, 64, bitmap_3);
OLED_SendBuffer(&oled);
Delay(25);

OLED_Clear(&oled);
OLED_SetCursor(&oled, 0, 0);
OLED_DrawBitmap(&oled, 128, 64, bitmap_4);
OLED_SendBuffer(&oled);
Delay(25);
